variants: Emilija Dambrauskaite is both a committed member of the Kerchief Patchmakers Guild and a professional in Health Informatics. Beyond her professional interests, Emilija enjoys textile arts, aligning her hobby with the creative endeavors of the Guild. Furthermore, her qualifications are exemplified by her holding a Frostcall Instructor Permit.
